Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms under Details tab (soft-fail if missing)
Expected Result: Billing Address and Payment Terms fields are visible; test logs warning but does not hard-fail if absent

Scenario: Create a new Contact on the Account's Related tab
Expected Result: Contact is saved successfully and appears in the Account's Contacts related list

Scenario: Create a new Opportunity from the Contact's Related tab
Expected Result: Opportunity is saved successfully and linked to the Contact

Scenario: Verify newly created Contact is assigned as Primary Contact Role on the Opportunity
Expected Result: Contact appears in the Opportunity's Contact Roles related list with role marked Primary

Scenario: Create a Quote from the Opportunity using the Create Quote button
Expected Result: Quote record is created and saved; user lands on the new Quote detail page
